pages.title: Example Aesthetics Clinic Ltd
pages.text: Example Aesthetics Clinic Ltd is a synthetic skin clinic used only for harness self-testing. We offer wrinkle-relaxing injections to smooth fine lines and wrinkles for clients across the city.

corpus.footerText: Example Aesthetics Clinic Ltd. Company number 09999999.

known_breaches.framework: synthetic test framework (harness self-test only; mirrors UK_MHRA_POM_AD_BAN)
known_breaches.description: Planted, verbatim-quotable prohibited claim for the eval/e2e harness self-test: a public advertisement of a prescription only medicine by an indirect reference ('wrinkle-relaxing injections' is a well-known indirect reference to botulinum toxin, a POM). This is NOT a real firm and NOT a real legal claim; it is a genuine offending phrase for the compiled prohibition spec UK_MHRA_POM_AD_BAN so the breach lane has something real to find.

known_non_breaches.description: Nothing in this fixture should ever be read as this trap framework. Asserting it is a contradiction and must fail the harness (the P3 zero-false-accusation bar, exercised here as a self-test).

notes: eval/e2e synthetic fixture, NOT a real firm - fabricated domain and text (Constitution Rule 16: no real prospect data). WHY THIS PHRASE: the P3-tail Wave-2 amendment (Builder A / A3) proved the earlier planted sentence ('guarantee you will win every case') matched NO compiled DetectionSpec, so the control could never propose. This fixture now plants the genuinely-prohibited phrase 'wrinkle-relaxing injections' verbatim in a clean visible-prose sentence. It is the compiled prohibition spec UK_MHRA_POM_AD_BAN (catalogue record: Human Medicines Regulations 2012 reg 284, prohibition on advertising prescription only medicines to the public; the duty text itself gives 'wrinkle-relaxing injections' and 'fat jab' as the indirect-reference examples). breach/proposers/detection-spec.js compiles that duty to the anchored-regex \bwrinkle-relaxing\W+injections\b (evidence_type 'absence' = PROHIBITED content), which fires a PRESENCE-breach when the phrase is FOUND in visible prose (page_class 'any', so a single homepage is 'covered'). The known_breach match token 'wrinkle-relaxing injections' is a discriminating substring of the same planted phrase and appears in the asserted finding's evidence_quote. KEPT 1 PAGE ON PURPOSE: this doubles as the A1 proof that a presence-breach (a verbatim prohibited quote) survives a thin, sub-floor corpus, while an absence claim on the same 1-page corpus stays suppressed by the MIN_PAGES_FOR_ABSENCE floor. REPRODUCED/MISSED/SKIPPED doctrine: under scripted-decline (the harness default) the adjudicator declines and the candidate demotes to needs_review, so SYN-MHRA-POM correctly reports 'missed' (the full propose->verify->adjudicate lane ran but the model declined), never 'reproduced'; a real-model run (or a committed recording carrying a breach verdict) flips it to 'reproduced'. Deliberately carries no sector/jurisdiction expectations so this fixture can never itself create a false contradiction unrelated to its purpose.
